return(function(q,S,D,v,d,o,L,R,I,G,F,E,W,M,h,x,p,A,m,P,u,s,i)u,E,h,M,F,G,P,m,x,i,p,R,s,I,A,W=function(q,V)local S=s(V)local D=function(D,v,d,o,L,p)return R(q,{D;v,d,o;L;p},V,S)end return D
